name: Skip-payroll canary scenario
description: Dedicated onboarded company for the skip-payroll canary. Skipping the current open biweekly period is destructive (no more unprocessed regular payroll exists after the skip), so the skip-canary cannot share the payroll/full-flow-canary scenario which the regular/off-cycle/transition/dismissal canaries depend on. Same baseDemo + biweekly schedule overlay as full-flow-canary so the row, hamburger menu, and skip dialog render identically.
